current_judgment: official rebuild lane now fails closed unless repo/AsciiDoc is available or HTML fallback is explicitly approved; stale full rebuild export is blocked by default
key_evidence: collector.collect_entry blocks source-first HTML collection when PBS_OFFICIAL_HTML_FALLBACK_ALLOWED is false
build_ocp420_full_rebuild_manifest.py writes blocked manifest/report and exits non-zero when fallback-only entries exist without approval
materialize_ocp420_full_rebuild_books.py exits non-zero by default because it still exports existing playbook payloads and HTML fallback assets
